---
name: User Research Methods
description: >-
  Utilizes methods such as user interviews, surveys, and usability testing to
  gather insights about users and their behavior.
---
## Overview

User research methods are essential for understanding user needs and behaviors. This involves using various techniques to gather data, analyze it, and draw meaningful conclusions.

## Use Cases

- Conducting user interviews to gather feedback on prototype designs
- Analyzing usability testing data to identify areas for improvement
- Developing personas based on user research findings

## Best Practices

- Always consider the business context when interpreting user research findings
- Use data to inform design decisions, rather than relying solely on intuition
- Continuously update and refine user research methods as new techniques emerge
